title: A Slave of Fashion
writer: Bess Meredyth, Jane Murfin, Samuel Shipman
actors: Norma Shearer, Lew Cody, William Haines
plot: Katherine Emerson, an Iowa girl hungry for the good things in life, leaves her small hometown and sets out for New York. En route, she is involved in a train wreck in which another woman is killed. Katherine finds the woman's purs...
